questions.q: Which police unit became the first in India to introduce an AI-powered multilingual feature in its emergency helpline ‘Namma 112’?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. Bengaluru Police added multilingual AI to Namma 112; exam point: first police unit in India. Memory hook: Namma 112 = Bengaluru/Karnataka.

questions.q: The AI system used in Bengaluru Police’s Namma 112 helpline is associated with which multilingual Voice AI framework?
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. The system uses VANKI, i.e., Voice AI for Nationwide Key Interventions; useful for digital governance and AI-current affairs questions.

questions.q: Which state approved the ‘Artificial Intelligence Policy 2026’ targeting over ₹10,000 crore investment and 1.5 lakh jobs by 2031?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. Maharashtra approved AI Policy 2026; exam hook: Maharashtra = ₹10,000 crore investment + 1.5 lakh jobs by 2031.

questions.q: Under Maharashtra Artificial Intelligence Policy 2026, how many AI innovation cities and sectoral Centres of Excellence are proposed?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. The policy proposes 5 AI innovation cities and 6 sectoral CoEs; important for state policy and technology questions.

questions.q: Tata AIA Life Insurance launched which unit-linked life insurance plan combining protection with long-term health funding?
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. Shubh Health Criti builds a market-linked health fund and covers 60+ critical illnesses; exam relevance: insurance product launches.

questions.q: From which date will the revised RBI guidelines on relief measures for borrowers in calamity-hit areas come into force?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. The revised RBI calamity-relief framework comes into force from July 1, 2026; very important for banking awareness.

questions.q: Under the revised RBI calamity-relief guidelines, lenders must invoke resolution plans within how many days of calamity declaration and implement them within how many days?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. Banks must invoke plans within 45 days and implement within 135 days; memory hook: 45–135 timeline.

questions.q: Which institution developed the Silicon Photonics PDK and Universal packaged PPIC Test Engine launched by MeitY?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. Both technologies were developed at the MeitY-supported CoE-CPPICS at IIT Madras; important for science-tech and Make-in-India questions.

questions.q: The Silicon Photonics Process Design Kit launched by MeitY includes more than how many verified components?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. The PDK includes more than 50 verified components; memory hook: PDK = 50+ components for photonic chip design.

questions.q: Sahajanand Medical Technologies obtained ISO 50001:2018 certification for which management system?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. ISO 50001:2018 relates to Energy Management System; useful static-current affairs link for certification questions.

questions.q: ISRO completed high-resolution Land Use and Land Cover mapping of India at which scale?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. ISRO completed LULC mapping at 1:10000 scale, where 1 cm equals 100 metres on ground; important for GIS and rural planning.

questions.q: The LULC dataset prepared by ISRO has been integrated into which GIS portal of the Ministry of Panchayati Raj?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. The dataset is integrated into Gram Manchitra; memory hook: Gram Manchitra = GIS tool for gram panchayat planning.

questions.q: Who assumed charge as the Controller General of Defence Accounts (CGDA) in 2026?
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. Anugraha Narayana Das became CGDA, succeeding Vishvajit Sahay; appointments are high-frequency exam facts.

questions.q: Justice (Retd.) Anupinder Singh Grewal was appointed President of which tribunal?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. He was appointed President of NCLT for 5 years or till age 67; exam hook: NCLT handles company law and insolvency matters.

questions.q: The ‘Namo Stall Distribution Scheme’ was introduced in Ranchi under which central scheme?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. The scheme was introduced under PM SVANidhi for street vendors; memory hook: SVANidhi = street vendor working capital/support.

questions.q: As per the IIM Ahmedabad impact evaluation, SVAMITVA is estimated to unlock rural land assets worth approximately how much?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. SVAMITVA is estimated to unlock ₹135 lakh crore rural land assets; exam relevance: government scheme impact and rural credit.

questions.q: Which institution topped the Times Higher Education Asia University Rankings 2026 for the 8th consecutive year?
questions.exp: Correct answer: C. Tsinghua University retained Rank 1 for the 8th year; memory hook: THE Asia 2026 topper = Tsinghua, China.

questions.q: Which Indian institution secured the 43rd rank and remained the only Indian institution in the top 50 of THE Asia University Rankings 2026?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. IISc Bengaluru ranked 43rd and was India’s only institution in the top 50; important for rankings questions.

questions.q: The 80th Round Household Consumption: Health Survey was released by which organisation?
questions.exp: Correct answer: B. NSO released the 80th Round Health Survey; exam hook: NSO under MoSPI is key for official survey data.

questions.q: Paras Defence and Space Technologies signed an MoU with Complus Systems and JV Micronics to pursue opportunities in which area?
questions.exp: Correct answer: A. The MoU focuses on anechoic and semi-anechoic chambers for India and global markets; useful for defence-industry MoU questions.
